1. 67 Questions Workbook (Section 8)
2. Module 3 Workbook/Checklist
Section 6: Biggest, OEP Promise Summarized
The unique aspect of your product or method that helps fulfill that big
promise whereas all other systems/methods/products failed.
This should be specific to the author/creator/product (and usually includes a
form of IP)
Section 7: Big How Summarized
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Product Walkthrough (Module names +
promise of each module)
Module/
Feature
Promise/
Outcome
So That
(Benefit)
Antithesis
(instead of)

-- 10 of 12 --

10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018 	-10-
Offer Fundamentals:
Bonuses
Golden Guarantee Elements:
Retail Price:
Launch/Promo Price:
Payment Options:
Bonus 1 - One that presupposes success in the main program/offer:
Bonus 2 - One that enables success in main program/offer while overcoming
the “this won’t work for me” objection. (ie. fb group, coaching, private access,
support, live event, etc. )
Other Bonuses:
Number of Days:
Specific Tangible Outcome:
Specific Emotional Outcome:
Specific Person to Contact for Refund:
Refind Eligibility Requirements:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
